'''''Star Wars Annual'' No. 1''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom in [[1978]] that collected the [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|''Star Wars'' Marvel UK]] series of comic books of the adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. The story was first published in the UK in the [[Star Wars Weekly|''Star Wars Weekly'']] comic series.

A year later, the book was followed up with ''[[Star Wars Annual 1979]]''.<ref name="SW.com" />
